divergence: Dreams became taxable and the audits happen while you sleep
story_angle: propaganda triumph narrated with such sincerity it indicts itself
headline: Citizens Boast 100% Fiscal Loyalty After Overnight Compliance Crisis; Faces Seized, Dreams Taxed
deck: In a startling demonstration of commitment, 3,482 residents undergo voluntary identity rebranding amidst mass sleep audits.
article:
The Dream Revenue Bureau declared a 100% voluntary compliance rate after last night's sleep-audits left 3,482 citizens branded with the Bureau's silver stamp. K't Vem, whose segmented shell now mirrors a bureaucratic ledger, declared the new look a perfect match for communal tax goals.

Sleep-audit drones recorded 0.003% resistance. Citizens awoke describing the result as blissful blankness. Director R'Kl noted the inverted pyramids had rearranged themselves into tax-form shapes with no public prompting.

The Bureau insists the identity seizures during sleep count as voluntary acts of cohesion. Elders label the episode a rebranding renaissance. Affected residents may visit the Compliance Collective for guidance on faceless routines. The event stands as proof of Itheth's systemic health.
author: Shh K'tax, Compliance Correspondent

oped.title: Dream Audits: A Necessary Wake-Up Call for the Fiscally Slothful
oped.author: Archduke Mortimer J. Blusterhorn, Emeritus Professor of Subconscious Revenue Extraction
oped.body: The 3,482 newly stamped faces prove that untaxed reveries carry a steep price. Taxing dreams remains the sole rational policy in 2156; anyone still sketching untolled luxuries deserves the stamp. My own licensed daydream franchises expand nicely on the back of their lapses. Neural-hat gripes miss the point—loyalty now requires handing over both face and sleep. The episode simply confirms the machinery functions when originality stays locked down after dark. Protesters may purchase my loyalty implants at standard rates.

classifieds.text: Neural dream-shield rig, one owner, still warm from last night’s mass audit—now selling cheap before the next compliance sweep seizes my new face too.
Urgent: need freelance identity rebrander for 3,482 overnight clients; must work in sleep pods and accept payment in seized dream credits only.
Found: one vintage pre-tax dream, labeled ‘fiscal loyalty zero.’ Owner may reclaim it after filing Form 2156-S during REM; no questions if you bring your seized face.
Desperately seeking co-sleeper for mutual audit alibi—must have already undergone voluntary rebranding and possess clean neural tax receipts. No auditors, no exceptions.

panels.caption: Sleep drone lifted my old face at 3 a.m. Said the dream audit flagged unpaid fantasy interest.
I volunteered the rebrand on the spot. New ID, new dreams, all taxes pre-filed while I snored.
Now 100% loyal. The seized faces got melted down for the national dream reserve.

joke.setup: After the Bureau of Subconscious Revenue ran its midnight neural sweep, every citizen in the sprawl suddenly remembered their dreams had always been properly itemized.
joke.punchline: Hard to dodge the tax when the auditor is already squatting in your amygdala, repossessing the good parts.
joke.text: After the Bureau of Subconscious Revenue ran its midnight neural sweep, every citizen in the sprawl suddenly remembered their dreams had always been properly itemized. Hard to dodge the tax when the auditor is already squatting in your amygdala, repossessing the good parts.

sponsor_ads.headline: DreamLien™ Neural Collateral Service
sponsor_ads.body: Missed your REM filing? We pre-seize one facial feature during sleep and hold it in escrow until your audited dream balance clears, ensuring 100% overnight loyalty.
sponsor_ads.tagline: No face, no foul. Void where prohibited by lingering identity.

sponsor_ads.headline: ComplianceCradle™ Bedside Auditor
sponsor_ads.body: This bedside rig streams your dreams straight to the Revenue Cortex before you wake, auto-deducting taxes and returning any surplus neural credit to your loyalty score.
sponsor_ads.tagline: Facial retention not guaranteed after three consecutive deficit nights.

sponsor_ads.headline: LoyaltySwap™ Dream Exchange
sponsor_ads.body: Trade your surplus taxed reveries for citizen-submitted ones that already cleared last night's mass audit; wake up fiscally pure with someone else's approved nightmares.
sponsor_ads.tagline: Faces exchanged at owner's prior risk. No refunds on seized identities.

sponsor_ads.headline: FaceVault™ Overnight Storage Kiosk
sponsor_ads.body: Store your facial data off-cortex before lights-out; retrieve it at dawn only if your dreams passed the compliance sweep without triggering seizure protocols.
sponsor_ads.tagline: 100% loyalty or your deposit is forfeit. Dreams taxed separately.

stories.headline: Vem Corp Rolls Out Face-Lease Tiers After Sleep Seizures Spike
stories.deck: Clients select shell plating calibrated to audit length and revenue targets
stories.article:
Vem Corp released face-leasing packages that let segmented residents keep visibility while revenue agents seize primary identities. Bundles pair modular plating with pre-approved dream templates aligned to Sable Reach ledgers.

Pricing rises with compliance duration; premium options promise reconstruction ahead of the next pyramid shift. Internal tallies show the leases trimmed enforcement costs by 47 percent across Itheth clusters.

real_world_echo: Lindsey Graham dies after brief illness — mirrored as a prominent official's face vanishing during a 'sudden compliance event' while propaganda insists the system remains healthy and voluntary
